summary.description: Concise explanation of the responsible AI review outcome.

decision.description: Overall assessment of whether the human approval is supported.

evidence.description: Key facts and rationale supporting the decision.

approvalAssessment.description: Whether the human decision is supported by underwriting and available context.

biasRisk.description: Potential inconsistency or bias signal from the override pattern.

policyRefs.description: Policy reference codes supporting the assessment.

supportingFacts.description: Concrete facts from underwriting and human decision context.

concerns.description: Identified consistency, override, or bias concerns.
